<BOS_TOKEN><|START_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|USER_TOKEN|>You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.

> open cupboard

Your goal for this game is: Put the gaticed on the table, the unbal on the table and the peach in the raticed.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a wardrobe, a pillow, a bed and a book. The wardrobe is closed. The pillow is on the bed. The book is on the floor. There is a passage to a hallway here.<|END_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|START_OF_TURN_TOKEN|><|CHATBOT_TOKEN|>
